thig7.2:1.2: a nun with developed faculties, I
thig7.2:2.1: “For whose sake have you shaved your head?
thig7.2:2.3: but don’t approve of a philosophy,
thig7.2:2.4:
so why are you wandering here confused?”
Cālā:
thig7.2:3.4: They’re not adept in the Dhamma.
thig7.2:4.2: the Awakened One, born in the Sakyan clan, a person without peer.
thig7.2:5.4: leading to the stilling of stress.
thig7.2:6.2: I dwell, delighting in his bidding.
thig7.2:7.4: that you have been, End-maker, struck down.
